user.title: Freematics ONE+ Setup
user.description:
A webhook will be created so your Freematics ONE+ device can push telemetry data directly to Home Assistant — no VPN or port forwarding needed.

Copy the **Webhook ID** below into your firmware `HA_WEBHOOK_ID` setting.

Set `SERVER_HOST` in the firmware to your HA hostname only (e.g. `homeassistant.local` or `abc123.ui.nabu.casa` for Nabu Casa), without protocol or path.

Full webhook URL: `{webhook_url}`

abort.already_configured: This webhook ID is already configured.
